THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, WILSON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 307 CAPP STREET APT. #12 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAY OF EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT TO REMAIN IN EFFECT SO LONG AS DEFENDANT WILSON MOORE MAKES TIMELY PAYMENTS TO PLAINTIFF AS STATED WITH PARTICULARITY IN THE AGREEMENT HEREIN. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR SPECIFIC TERMS AND CONDITIONS AGREED TO BY DEFENDANT AND BY PLAINTIFF.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-12-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Leticia Perez. Edward Mack Liu, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff and Isabel McAndrews, Esq. appeared for the Defendant. The matter settled per oral stipulation of the parties on the record. Trial date is vacated.
